name: Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc.
description: Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to transforming the treatment of central nervous system (CNS) disorders. By integrating insights from human genetics, translational science, and patient experience, the company develops precision therapies for conditions characterized by neuronal excitation-inhibition imbalance, including epilepsy and movement disorders. Praxis utilizes its proprietary Cerebrum™ small molecule and Solidus™ antisense oligonucleotide platforms to identify and target biologically defined mechanisms of disease. Headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts, the company is committed to advancing a diversified pipeline of innovative medicines to address significant unmet needs for patients and families.
